horoscope: Mars, your ruling planet, is stirring things up today, dear Aries, in good ways! You're in wonderful shape for making excellent use of personal time or for work behind the scenes. A low boredom threshold can actually work in your favor, leading you to fun or even breakthrough discoveries. You want to make your luck and opportunities today, and it's a fine time for uplifting, forward-looking, and inspired connections and methods. Even so, this is a time when you are not quite as willing to share your thoughts and plans until you come to better understand them yourself. Intuition runs high right now, making it a good time for original methods and taking actions that free you from hindrances and problems. Take note of your instincts on matters of comfort, security, and money.

With Mars in harmony with forward-looking Uranus, dear Taurus, you're sure to find plenty of it. It's a potentially excellent day for personal initiatives. You're in an excellent opportunity period for making valuable connections and for standing out from the crowd in a very good way. You need to "own" the path you take, and the best way to do that is to get in touch with where you truly want to go, without the distractions of other people's agendas and opinions. Energy and confidence are with you today. You are cooperative yet also quite willing to take the lead. Good energy is with you for applying new ideas and methods that help improve your life, and you're shining now.

Good energy is with you today for both your personal life and career or reputation matters, dear Gemini. A good deed or a piece of work you've done in the past can be rewarded or recognized. A tolerant, forward-looking spirit will help you achieve your goals more efficiently today. You want to do something out of the ordinary, and by thinking outside the box, you benefit. You possess great enterprise, which allows you to capitalize on opportunities. Others are supportive or, at the very least, cooperative, and this is particularly helpful now since you're not very interested in interference. It's a good time to stick your neck out, do something a little differently, and nurture ambition, a project, or a goal. You can be particularly productive with just a little focus. It's an innovative, self-starting period when you're inclined to take the initiative.

A desire to be free and independent surfaces today, dear Cancer, with today's Mars-Uranus transit. Your inventive side is also in the spotlight. You're cooperative, but you'd prefer not to have anyone slow you down as you need to follow your internal rhythm. This doesn't mean you won't benefit from sharing your knowledge or expertise. In fact, your unique vision or opinions help you to stand out from the crowd. This can also be a great time for initiatives or plans for publishing, teaching, or learning. Nurturing a special interest, dream, project, or study can be exciting and motivating. A chance to catch up with a special friend could also be a highlight now. Your desire to study or learn something special is also strong.

Not only are you attracting positive attention today, dear Leo, but you're also inspiring trust. It's a good time to enjoy a special project or make plans for something that you haven't had time for in the past. You're taking charge, and adopting new ideas or methods with great success now. Non-traditional methods and attitudes work best for you at the moment. Showing a spirit for advancement and excitement about the future can be infectious, leading to more opportunities. You might also throw yourself into a passion project, research, an investigation, or mystery, and the Moon's move into your work and health sector animates your daily affairs.

People in your life can be refreshingly cooperative and looking forward rather than getting stuck in a groove right now, dear Virgo. This is pleasing, even if it's also a little destabilizing, as you're shifting your plans and doing things differently. Common goals and philosophies are apparent now and can help boost a bond. You have a strong sense of adventure, or the desire to do something a little different and innovative can dominate. The brave or experimental side of your nature emerges. You're also likely to have interesting, inspired conversations, but the focus is more on getting things done than just talking about them. This can be an animated time for relationships, and someone can motivate you.

The Moon heads into your solar fourth house today, dear Libra, and while this transit usually encourages a desire to settle in, today's energies are forward-looking and stirring. A Mars-Uranus transit favors taking small risks and making progress rather than sticking with the tried-and-true. Your idealism is in the spotlight, and it can motivate you to make some changes. You could have a strong desire to move forward with a project or even a chore, reach a breakthrough moment, or approach a health matter or pursuit in a new way. Either way, you're enthusiastic and ready to take on a small challenge. You want to do something out of the ordinary, fresh, and unique, and you can get a lot done with this kind of inspiration and a sense that you're doing something cutting edge or exciting. A significant discovery about a financial matter or intimate relationship made now can set you on a new course. Breaking from the past may be in focus, and it feels good.

The Moon heads into your communications sector for a couple of days, dear Scorpio, and your focus is on mental engagement. Your energy levels and power of attraction also run high today. You're ready to take on a challenge to be involved in a project or relationship that excites you. Good energy is with you for creative tasks and for inspired ways of interacting with others. You are willing to take the lead in a relationship right now, without stepping on anyone's toes. Being direct and straightforward works wonders today. Express yourself creatively without inhibition for fabulous results now. Today's Mars-Uranus aspect stirs your partnership and creativity sectors, and your romantic or creative life might heat up. You're seeking playful ways of expressing yourself.

Today's influences boost energy for work around the home or for taking the lead in your personal life, dear Sagittarius. It's a great time to work on letting go of grudges, which can be toxic to you the longer you hold onto them. Energies now invite forward movement, change, and liberation, making it ideal for leaving behind something negative, difficult, or unhealthy. A forward-looking, positive mood suits you now as Mars and Uranus harmonize. If you're feeling inspired, you can move mountains, and opportunities might emerge (or you're making them) to approach things a little differently. It can be a good time for technological improvements that improve your life or work. You can turn unglamorous tasks into something creative and exciting today. It's a time of animation, energy, and perhaps a bit of commotion in your personal life, home, or family matters. Directing energy into household projects and family activities can be constructive and satisfying.

Transits today support a forward-looking, positive approach to your daily affairs and personal life, dear Capricorn. You may be paying special attention to a personal interest, a study, or a project, and it's exciting and motivating. You can be in the mood to take a personal gamble or try something new, especially in writing, speaking, or creating, and the results can be fun. Somebody, or perhaps a piece of news, might challenge you to think in new ways or to consider an entirely different perspective. If allowed some spontaneity and leeway, you can come up with a fabulous idea now. You're standing out as especially creative and unique, and this is a fine time for energy, initiative, creativity, and romantic attraction. It's a time to feel competent and confident about what you're learning, sharing, and doing.

The day holds wonderful promise for special interests, plans, and methods, dear Aquarius. Transits help you detach just enough to get to the other side of a problem. You're likely to entertain some interesting and unique creative ideas about money or domestic matters, or your special approach to old problems can help you put a negative situation behind you. Different methods applied to the home, family, money, living conditions, or living arrangements can be in focus and especially positive. It may be time to upgrade, improve, and innovate. You could be a little bolder in business or with money, and you're ready to take action on a matter that has been lingering or stagnating as Mars and Uranus harmonize. You could also be motivating loved ones with your enthusiasm now. Or, a stronger desire for financial independence motivates and drives you.

Today's Mars-Uranus aspect offers a slightly detached, freer energy that boosts your connections, dear Pisces. Good energy is with you for some friendly competition that stirs you and challenges you to do your best or to reach higher. Don't be afraid to express your creativity! You might decide to throw yourself into personal or mental projects, or there can be opportunities to express and enjoy yourself that give you a sense of moving forward. It can be a time when you feel you can take on virtually anything, and this is particularly the case on a mental level. This aspect inspires you to express yourself more assertively, spontaneously, or courageously. Your projects, interests, or even news you hear can inspire you. It's a great time to explore new ideas, and a new perspective on an old problem can lead you to action. Drive, enterprise, courage, and energy are in greater abundance now.
